sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11860" key="a)peniau/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπενῐαύτ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n11860.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">banishment for a term of years,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τριετεῖς ἀ.</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg034.perseus-grc1:868e" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">868e</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ισις</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
